author: Disney YouTube
text:
Pirates of the Caribbean | Sound Design Breakdown
Take a deep dive look at a singular scene throughout the sound design process, step by step. 

Dialogue: On-set recordings of the actors' performances with added studio-recorded audio (ADR).

Sound Effects: Adding hand-crafted SFX (foley) to shape the environment and ambiance.

Music: Composed instrumental score to enhance emotional impact and tone.

Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl now streaming on Disney+
